value.stringValue: Default Outcome encountered, back to Reship/Reorder

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Failed_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address Failed - Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_I_Will_Update_the_Address
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - I Will Update the Address

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Passed_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - Passed - Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Use_Suggested_Address
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - Use Suggested Address

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Use_the_Address_Provided
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - Use the Address Provided

assignments.description: Since we are overriding we need to bypass all checks in the "Get Valid Lab Provider" subflow.
assignments.name: Set_Override_Flag_for_Lab_Provider_Check
assignments.label: Set Override Flag for Lab Provider Check

assignments.name: Set_ReOrder_Status_and_Status_Reason
assignments.label: Set ReOrder Status and Status Reason

assignments.name: Set_Reship_Status_and_Status_Reason
assignments.label: Set Reship Status and Status Reason

assignments.name: Set_Shipping_Information_Opportunity_Region_Override_Non_Validated
assignments.label: Set Shipping Information - Opportunity - Region Override - Non Validated

assignments.name: Set_Shipping_Information_Opportunity_Validate_Address
assignments.label: Set Shipping Information - Opportunity - Validate Address

value.stringValue: The Body Mass Index (BMI) value for this patient is over range. Please review the entered data to ensure accuracy.
The Body Mass Index (BMI) value for this patient is under range. Please review the entered data to ensure accuracy.

rules.name: I_will_update_the_address_manually

rightValue.stringValue: I will update the address manually
I will update the address manually

rules.label: I will update the address manually

decisions.description: Check if there is a related Opportunity
decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_update_the_Opportunity
decisions.label: Do we need to update the Opportunity

decisions.description: Depending on the checkbox on the screen element if we skip the address validation check or not from SF.
decisions.name: Do_We_Skip_Address_Validation_Check
decisions.label: Do We Skip Address Validation Check

decisions.description: We have a function that will go through all of the line items to compile a collection of requested items that needs to be sent to the lab. Here we check if that was successful or not.
decisions.name: Gather_Requested_Items_Successful
decisions.label: Gather Requested Items Successful

decisions.name: Is_there_a_Kit_Id_on_the_Opportunity
decisions.label: Is there a Kit Id on the Opportunity
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Kit Id on the Opportunity

decisions.description: Checks if there is a lab order or not, can't log against a lab order if there is none.
decisions.name: Is_There_A_Lab_Order_Fault_Log
decisions.label: Is There A Lab Order - Fault - Log

decisions.name: Is_There_A_Lab_Order_Passed
decisions.label: Is There A Lab Order - Passed

decisions.description: If the order is in Rejected status, we leave the status and status reason as it is for reporting purposes, and we put the flag to reship order as true
decisions.name: Was_order_Rejected
decisions.label: Was order Rejected

formulas.description: Check if address validation for Region Override returned No Suggestion
formulas.name: bool_isNoSuggestionRegionOverride
formulas.expression: OR( {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedState} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry} = "No Suggestion" )

formulas.name: form_txtUSAddressValidation
formulas.expression: CASE( LOWER({!address_ToPatient.country}), "united states", "US", "united states of america", "US", "usa", "US", "u.s.a.", "US", "u.s.", "US", "us of a", "US", "amerika", "US", "america", "US", "united states america", "US", "us america", "US", "us territory", "US", "us mainland", "US", "states", "US", "the states", "US", {!address_ToPatient.country} )

fields.name: Copy_1_of_disclaimer_message
fields.fieldText:
Disclaimer:

The suggested address has been provided based on Google Address Validation. Please verify that all parts of the address are correct before proceeding.

The suggested address may not always reflect accurate or up-to-date information for your intended purpose. By proceeding, you acknowledge and accept any potential discrepancies with the suggested address.



**Suggested Address**

Street: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet}

City: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity}

State: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedState}

Postal Code: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode}

Country: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry

fields.name: txt_ErrorGatherRequestedItems
fields.fieldText:
Woops, we ran into an issue while gathering the required items.


Error Message:

{!Create_Collection_of_Requested_Items.txt_ErrorMessage}

fields.name: txt_FlowFaultMessage
fields.fieldText:
Woops, ran into the following error:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: txt_ShippingHeader
fields.fieldText: Please ensure the shipping information is correct below and then finish the submission request.

fields.name: txtErrorBothCheckboxChecked
fields.fieldText: Please only check either "Use Account Billing Address" or "Use Account Shipping Address"

fields.name: InvalidShippingAddress
fields.fieldText: There was an error validating this address: {!Validate_Address_Action.errorMessage} {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Skip_Address_Validation_Check
fields.helpText: If this box is checked, the Lab Order automation will skip address validation. The distribution company may still reject this Order due to an invalid shipping address.

fields.name: Invalid_Lab_Provider
fields.fieldText: Invalid Lab Provider, please select another one and try again.

fields.name: Display_Error
fields.fieldText:
﻿{!$Label.Style_Header_Red}

Address Validation Error


The address provided could not be validated.

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Use Suggested Address","value":"Use Suggested Address","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Continue Anyway","value":"Continue","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1},{"label":"Enter new address manually","value":"I will update the address manually","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":2}]

[{"label":"Continue Anyway","value":"Continue","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Enter new address manually","value":"I will update the address manually","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1}]

textTemplates.name: txt_ApproverNotification
